paper.title: Using GPT-4o reasoning to transform cancer care
paper.abstract: Color Health is working with OpenAI to pioneer a new way of accelerating cancer patients’ access to treatment. Their new Cancer Copilot application uses GPT-4o to identify missing diagnostics and create tailored workup plans, enabling healthcare providers to make evidence-based decisions about cancer screening and treatment.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
